metadata.name: Scalable systemic stress network
metadata.pd_source: Moody's Corporate Default & Recovery Rates 1920-2004, Exhibit 17 (whole-letter, Year-1)
calibration_sources: Moody's Corporate Default & Recovery Rates 1920-2004, Exhibit 17 (whole-letter, Year-1)
Bardoscia et al. 2021 (scale-free core-periphery interbank topology)

metadata.description: Programmatic institution mix on a sparse scale-free core-periphery exposure graph; per-rating marginals, 4-8% Tier-1 buffers, <=25%-of-Tier-1 single-counterparty cap, ~20% interbank-asset share.
